meaning: 阿纳姆[荷兰东部城市](或译安亨)
examples: Italy play England on Thursday in Arnhem.
A rock-art impression of a kangaroo appears on a wall at the Malarrak site in Arnhem Land in northern Australia.
They yelled and swore at the Brits, told them those were their countrymen in Arnhem and they needed help, now.
Army barracks in the southern city of Arnhem are being prepared to take the next group of 1, 000.
Radiata pine is loaded into one of two reactors at the company's plant in Arnhem in the Netherlands.
